title: Visiting Berlin in June: Quick Take
items: June brings mild temperatures (12 to 22°C average) and the longest daylight of the year, nearly 17 hours on the summer solstice.
Two unmissable annual events: Fête de la Musique on June 21 (free music across the city) and the Long Night of the Sciences in early June.
Peak tourist season ramps up mid-month. Book accommodation and tours two to three weeks ahead.
Beer gardens, lake swimming, and Spree boat rides hit their stride this month.
June carries some of Berlin's heaviest 20th-century history. The Blockade, the 1953 uprising, and JFK's speech all happened in this month.
